ab: mosa’ su’ inu’?
ch: A:你要去哪裡?
en: A: Where are you going?

ab: mawsa’ su’ inu’?
ch: A:你要去哪裡?

ab: mosa’ saku’ muhi’ ramat qmazyah.
ch: B:我要去菜園裡種菜。
en: B: I’m going to plant vegetables in the garden.

ab: mawsa’ saku’ muhi’ ramat qmazyah.
ch: B:我要去菜園裡種菜。
en: B: I’m going to plant vegetables in the garden.

ab: nanu’ cyux su’ pcyuwagun?
ch: A:你在做什麼?
en: A: What are you doing?

ab: pzyux izyal k’man la, nyux saku’ smalit, pqsya’an maku’ kira’.
ch: B:草太多了，我在砍草，等一下要澆水。
en: B:There’s too much grass, I’m cutting it, I’ll have to water it later.

ab: ani saku’ magal cikay soki’ ru pkaruh hku?
ch: A+:幫我把鐮刀和鋤頭拿來好嗎?
en: A: Will you get my scythes and hoes, please?

ab: ani saku’ magal cikay sawki’ ru pkaruh hma’?
ch: A:幫我把鐮刀和鋤頭拿來好嗎?
en: A: Will you get my scythes and hoes, please?

ab: cyux su’ syun inu’?
ch: B:你放在哪裡呢?
en: B: Where did you put it?

ab: cyux maki’ sa bih na ’’amar.
ch: A:放在犁耙旁邊。
en: A: Put it next to the plow rake.

ab: cyux maki’ sa bih na kalu’.
ch: A:放在犁耙旁邊。
en: A: Put it next to the plow rake.

ab: cinbulan su’ uraw la?
ch: A:你翻過土了嗎?
en: A: Did you turn over the soil?

ab: misan maku’ tnabul, ghapan maku’ kira’.
ch: B:我剛翻過土，等等要播種。
en: B: I just turned over the soil, and so on to sow seeds.

ab: mosa’ blaq klhun qu pinmuhi’ su’ ramat la?
ch: A+:你種的菜可以收成了嗎?
en: A: Are your vegetables ready to be harvested?

ab: mawsa’ blaq klhun qu pinmuhi’ su’ ramat la?
ch: A:你種的菜可以收成了嗎?
en: A: Are your vegetables ready to be harvested?

ab: mosa’ blaq klhun qu tmana’ te runi hizya’ la. izyat baqun kmyut na’ qu sina’ ka cyux te hasa hizya’ na’.
ch: B:這裡的高麗菜可以收成了，那裡的昭和草就還不能收成。
en: B: The cabbage here is ready to be harvested, but the Showa grass there is not yet ready to be harvested.

ab: mawsa’ blaq klhun qu tmana’ tay runi hizya’ la. izyat baqun kmyut na’ qu sina’ ka cyux tay hasa hizya’ na’.
ch: B:這裡的高麗菜可以收成了，那裡的昭和草就還不能收成。
en: B: The cabbage here is ready to be harvested, but the Showa grass there is not yet ready to be harvested.

ab: talagay kinpzyux knihuy su’ ngahi’.
ch: A:哇!你挖了這麼多的地瓜。
en: A:Wow! You dug up so many gourds.

ab: hali smku’ cikay sa khu’ ha, ku?
ch: B:幫我放穀倉好嗎?
en: B: Will you help me with the barn?

ab: hali smku’ cikay sa khu’ ha, ma’?
ch: B:幫我放穀倉好嗎?
en: B: Will you help me with the barn?

ab: nanu’ cyux mamu pcyuwagun?
ch: A:你們在做什麼?
en: A: What are you doing?

ab: nyux sami smi’ ami’ kkzyap qulih.
ch: B:我們在放漁網抓魚。
en: B: We’re releasing fishing nets to catch fish.

ab: pzyux qulih nya’ sqani?
ch: A:這裡的魚多嗎?
en: A: Are there many fish here?

ab: pzyux qulih cyux qrqan na sguzyu’ la.
ch: B:魚簍裡已經抓了很多魚。
en: B: The fish basket has been full of fish.

ab: mutux su’ son nanu’ magal qu qulih?
ch: A+:你平常怎麼抓魚?
en: A: How do you usually catch fish?

ab: mutux su’ sawn nanu’ magal qu qulih?
ch: A:你平常怎麼抓魚?
en: A: How do you usually catch fish?

ab: mutux maku’ si buy na panaq.
ch: B:我都用魚叉射魚。
en: B: I shoot fish with a spear.

ab: baq su’ tmqsinu na bhuniq?
ch: A:你會用弓箭打獵嗎?
en: A: Do you know how to hunt with a bow and arrow?

ab: mutux maku’ ssi’ mrusa’ tmiriq qsinu, kruma’ ga mutux maku’ sbing patus ru s’aras huzil.
ch: B:我通常都是用陷阱抓獵物，偶爾也會拿槍帶狗狩獵。
en: B: I usually catch my prey with a trap, but occasionally I hunt with a gun and a dog.

ab: qani ga, tuqi na bzyok qnhyun.
ch: A+:這是山豬所走的路。
en: A: This is the road the boar took.

ab: qani ga, tuqi na bzyuwak qnhyun.
ch: A:這是山豬所走的路。
en: A: This is the road the boar took.

ab: swa’ su’ baqun?
ch: B:你怎麼知道呢?
en: B: How do you know?

ab: qani ga, rapar na bzyok, nanu’ yasa qu baqun maha qani ga tuqi na bzyok la.
ch: A:這是山豬的腳印，所以這是山豬所走的路。
en: A: These are the footprints of the boar, so this is the path the boar took.

ab: qani ga, rapar na bzyuwak, nanu’ yasa qu baqun maha qani ga tuqi na bzyuwak la.
ch: A:這是山豬的腳印，所以這是山豬所走的路。
en: A: These are the footprints of the boar, so this is the path the boar took.

ab: ihi’ hali mita’ mrusa’ ta’, hazi’ cyux ciriq la.
ch: A:快去看我們的陷阱，好像抓到獵物了。
en: A: Go and see our trap, for it seems that we have caught our prey.

ab: swa’ su’ baqun?
ch: B:你怎麼知道呢?
en: B: How do you know?

ab: hazi cyux sokan na huzil la. ihi’ glgay ta’.
ch: A:狗好像聞到味道了。我們快跟過去。
en: A: The dog seems to have smelled it. Let’s follow them.

ab: hazi cyux sawkan na huzil la. ihi’ glgay ta’.
ch: A:狗好像聞到味道了。我們快跟過去。
en: A: The dog seems to have smelled it. Let’s follow them.

ab: nanu’ qu nyux su’ kblazyun?
ch: A:你正在製作的是什麼東西?
en: A: What are you working on?

ab: qani hizya’ ga, rangay, ’pux sa qoli’.
ch: B:這是石壓式陷阱，用來抓老鼠的。
en: B: This is a stone trap, used to catch rats.

ab: qani hizya’ ga, rangay, ’pux sa qawli’.
ch: B:這是石壓式陷阱，用來抓老鼠的。
en: B: This is a stone trap, used to catch rats.

ab: nanu’ qu cyux su’ bhngun sqasa hizya’?
ch: A:你放在那裡的是什麼東西?
en: A: What is that thing you put there?

ab: qasa hizya’ ga, mrusa’, tciriq myan para’.
ch: B:那是套腳式繩索陷阱，我們用它來抓山羌。
en: B: It was a leg-rigged rope trap, and we used it to catch Shankiang.

ab: mhway yaba’ utux kayal, pzyux balay tniriq ta’ qsinu soni’.
ch: A+:感謝祖靈賜福，今天我們有很多獵物收獲。
en: A: Thanks to the blessing of our ancestors, we had a great harvest today.

ab: mhway yaba’ utux kayal, pzyux balay tniriq ta’ qsinu sawni’.
ch: A:感謝祖靈賜福，今天我們有很多獵物收獲。
en: A: Thanks to the blessing of our ancestors, we had a great harvest today.

ab: balay! rasaw ta’ qalang ru halay ta’ minblaq mqasu ki glglu ta’.
ch: B:是啊!我們帶回部落好好分享吧!
en: B: Yeah! Let’s take it back to the tribe and share it!
